title: Example: Scaling Vision Transformers to 22B Parameters
summary: Google explores scaling ViT to 22 billion parameters with improved training stability and downstream task performance.
narratorHint: Today's top paper — scaling ViTs to unprecedented sizes for better representation learning.

title: Understanding MoE Dispatch in DeepSeek-V3
summary: A deep dive into the auxiliary-loss-free load balancing strategy used in DeepSeek-V3's Mixture of Experts architecture.
narratorHint: My blog post — understanding how DeepSeek-V3 balances expert load without auxiliary losses.

title: Emergent World Models in Large-Scale Video Prediction
summary: A new approach to video prediction that shows emergent understanding of physics and scene dynamics at scale.
narratorHint: Video prediction with emergent world models — interesting for autonomous driving applications.
